data.content: Plan: 1) Create internal/doctor/doctor.go with Run(ctx, store, ageTool, opts) Report. CheckResult{Name, Status, Detail} struct. 2) Sub-files for each check: age (resolved path, version, sha256 of binary), identity (presence, mode 0600), store (presence, mode 0700, writeable), manifest (parseable, no version conflict, bundles exist), bundles (per-namespace SHA-256 match), web port (TCP listen probe on 127.0.0.1:8787), recipients (count + prefix + thumbprint). 3) Add CONTRIBUTING.md 'Setup verification' section. 4) Update README install section with one-line pointer. 5) Add internal/cli/run_doctor.go: --json flag for machine-readable; tabular default with red/yellow/green ANSI when stdout is a terminal; non-zero exit on any fail. 6) Tests: deliberately broken setup in temp dir asserts each diagnostic fires.
